query: SELECT p.id as pipelineId, p.name as pipelineName, p.account_id, ps.id as stageId, ps.name as stageName FROM pipelines p LEFT JOIN pipeline_stages ps ON ps.pipeline_id = p.id WHERE p.account_id IN (450002, 390025, 420001) ORDER BY p.account_id, p.id, ps.sort_order
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nUtjHxifDnrEvTS.bc571705cde8 --database KNXKWFANWEUxWWEfuwT2Hr --execute SELECT p.id as pipelineId, p.name as pipelineName, p.account_id, ps.id as stageId, ps.name as stageName FROM pipelines p LEFT JOIN pipeline_stages ps ON ps.pipeline_id = p.id WHERE p.account_id IN (450002, 390025, 420001) ORDER BY p.account_id, p.id, ps.sort_order
